PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $files = @\("logo-bleu.png","Logo_TransaSchool.png","LogoFondBleu.png"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $path = if \($f -eq "logo-bleu.png"\) { "d:\\A-SCHOOL\\frontend\\public\\$f" } else { "d:\\A-SCHOOL\\Logo_aSchool\\$f" }; if \(Test-Path $path\) { $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($path\); Write-Output "$f — $\($img.Width\)x$\($img.Height\)px — $\([math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $path\).Length/1KB\)\)KB"; $img.Dispose\(\) } })

PowerShell(try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "BACKEND UP: $\($h | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "BACKEND INJOIGNABLE sur :8000 — $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Process=$p.ProcessName; Path=$p.Path; Started=$p.StartTime } } | Format-List; Write-Output "---- ports 5173 / 8001 ----"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,8001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Process=$p.ProcessName } } | Format-List)

PowerShell(foreach \($port in @\(8002,8003,8080,8888\)\) { $busy = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($busy\) { Write-Output "$port : OCCUPE \(PID $\($busy.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { Write-Output "$port : LIBRE" } })
PowerShell($b = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($b\) { "8001 : encore OCCUPE \(PID $\($b.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "8001 : LIBRE" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "==== git status ===="; git status --short; Write-Output "`n==== port 8001 \(mon backend bg doit etre arrete\) ===="; $b = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($b\) { "8001 OCCUPE PID $\($b.OwningProcess\)" } else { "8001 LIBRE" }; Write-Output "`n==== vite.config proxy \(la modif port doit etre la\) ===="; Select-String -Path frontend/vite.config.js -Pattern "VITE_API_PORT" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })
